zh.lifeSummary: 當Lope López de Haro於大約1150年出生在西班牙卡塔倫亞萊里達利爾時，他的父親Lope Díaz I de Haro45歲，母親Aldonça Rodrigues de Castro16歲。他和Maria d'Urgell senyora d'Almenara至少有2個兒子。他去世於大約1180年享年32歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lope López de Haro于大约1150年出生在西班牙卡塔倫亞萊里達利爾时，他的父亲Lope Díaz I de Haro45岁，母亲Aldonça Rodrigues de Castro16岁。他和Maria d'Urgell senyora d'Almenara至少有2个儿子。他去世于大约1180年享年32岁。

nameMeanings.name: López
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Juan, Manuel, Carlos, Luis, Jesus, Francisco, Pedro, Miguel, Jorge, Raul, Ramon, Mario.
Spanish (López): patronymic from the medieval personal name Lope ‘wolf’. This is one of the commonest of all Spanish surnames. In the US, it is the twelfth most frequent surname. Compare De Lopez .

Jewish (Sephardic): adoption of the Spanish surname (see 1 above) at the moment of conversion to Roman Catholicism. After the return to Judaism (generations later), some descendants retained the name their families used as Catholics.

variants.name: Lopes
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Manuel, Jose, Carlos, Fernando, Luis, Julio, Mario, Americo, Armando, Jorge, Alvaro, Ana.  Portuguese Joao, Joaquim, Ilidio, Martinho, Paulo, Serafim, Anabela, Duarte, Mateus, Aderito, Afonso, Agostinho.
Portuguese and Galician: patronymic from the medieval personal name Lopo (from Latin lupus ‘wolf’).
Spanish: variant or altered form of López (see Lopez ).

variants.name: Lope
meanings: Spanish: from the old personal name Lope, from Latin lupus ‘wolf’.

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.
Indian: variant of   Dey  .

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Haro
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Jesus, Juan, Luis, Salvador, Manuel, Carlos, Jorge, Miguel, Alberto, Francisco, Jaime.
Spanish: habitational name from a place in the province of La Rioja, so called from a North Castilian form of Spanish faro ‘beacon’. Compare De Haro .
In some cases possibly also French: metonymic occupational name for a peddler, from an Old French cry used to hail someone or to attract attention.

variants.name: De Haro
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Rafael, Arturo, Jaime, Jesus, Ubaldo, Alfredo, Enrique, Felipe, Francisco, Gustavo, Juan.
Spanish: habitational name, formed with the preposition de ‘from’, for someone from a place called Haro (see Haro ).

variants.name: Haros
meanings: Hispanic (mainly Mexico): probably the plural form of Spanish   Haro  .
Greek: variant of   Charos  .

nameMeanings.name: Lope
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the Late Latin name Lupus ‘wolf’, probably adopted as a calque of the Germanic name Wolf .

en.lifeSummary: When Lope López de Haro was born about 1150, in l'Urgell, Lleida, Catalonia, Spain, his father, Lope Díaz I de Haro, was 45 and his mother, Aldonça Rodrigues de Castro, was 16. He had at least 2 sons with Maria d'Urgell senyora d'Almenara. He died about 1180, at the age of 32.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lope López de Haro est né environ 1150, à l'Urgell, Lleida, Catalunya, Espagne, son père, Lope Díaz I de Haro, avait 45 ans et sa mère, Aldonça Rodrigues de Castro, avait 16 ans. Il a eu au moins 2 fils avec Maria d'Urgell senyora d'Almenara. Il est décédé environ 1180, à l’âge de 32 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lope López de Haro um 1150 in l'Urgell, Lleida, Catalunya, Spanien geboren wurde, war sein Vater Lope Díaz I de Haro 45 und seine Mutter Aldonça Rodrigues de Castro 16. Er hatte mit Maria d'Urgell senyora d'Almenara mindestens 2 Söhne. Er starb um 1180 im Alter von 32 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lope López de Haro è nato il circa 1150 nel l'Urgell, Lleida, Catalunya, Spagna, il suo padre, Lope Díaz I de Haro, aveva 45 anni e il suo madre, Aldonça Rodrigues de Castro, aveva 16 anni. Lui avuto almeno 2 figli con Maria d'Urgell senyora d'Almenara. Morì circa 1180, all'età di 32 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Lope López de Haroが約1150年にスペインカタルニーアレイダル'ウルジェルで生まれた時，父Lope Díaz I de Haroは45歳，母Aldonça Rodrigues de Castroは16歳であった。彼はMaria d'Urgell senyora d'Almenaraとの間に少なくとも2人の息子をもうけた。彼は約1180年に32歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Lope López de Haro(이)가 대략 1150년 스페인 카털니아 레이다 '르그에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Lope Díaz I de Haro(은)는 45세였고, 그의 어머니 Aldonça Rodrigues de Castro(은)는 16세였다. 그는 Maria d'Urgell senyora d'Almenara(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 대략 1180년 32세의 나이로 사망했다.

mg.about 1150–ABT 1180: tany ho any amin'ny 1150–tany ho any amin'ny 1180

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lope López de Haro nasceu aproximadamente 1150, em l'Urgell, Lleida, Catalunya, Espanha, seu pai, Lope Díaz I de Haro, tinha 45 anos e sua mãe, Aldonça Rodrigues de Castro, tinha 16 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 2 filhos com Maria d'Urgell senyora d'Almenara. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1180, com 32 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lope López de Haro родился около 1150 г. в местности л'ургелл, ллида, каталуня, Испания, его отцу по имени Lope Díaz I de Haro было 45 лет, а матери, которую звали Aldonça Rodrigues de Castro, 16. У него было по крайней мере 2 сына от Maria d'Urgell senyora d'Almenara. Он умер около 1180 г. в возрасте 32 лет.

sm.about 1150–ABT 1180: e tusa o le 1150–e tusa o le 1180

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lope López de Haro nació aproximadamente 1150, en Urgel, Lérida, Cataluña, España, su papá, Lope Díaz I de Haro, tenía 45 años y su mamá, Aldonça Rodrigues de Castro, tenía 16 años. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijos con Maria d'Urgell senyora d'Almenara. Murió aproximadamente 1180, a la edad de 32 años.
